title: pyrus lambertii
intro: Pyrus lambertii, also known as Lambert's pear or Chinese pear, is a species of pear tree native to China. The bark, leaves, and fruit of the Pyrus lambertii plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Pyrus lambertii plant can be made into teas or infusions, and the fruit can be eaten raw or used to make jams and preserves.
